timeline.title: NSW LTESA Round 3 awarded (200 MW contracted)
timeline.detail: Uungula awarded NSW LTESA Round 3 underwriting — 200 MW contracted under the cap+floor strike mechanism. Full project nameplate is 414 MW (AEMO Generation Information); the remaining 214 MW sits outside the LTESA contract.

timeline.title: NSW planning approval
timeline.detail: Uungula granted NSW state planning consent in 2021.

scheme_contracts.contract_type: Generation LTESA (cap + floor strike, CPI-linked, NSW Crown counterparty)

stakeholder_issues.issue: 214 MW of nameplate sits outside LTESA contract
stakeholder_issues.detail: Squadron's Uungula totals 414 MW per AEMO Generation Information but only 200 MW is covered by the LTESA R3 contract. The 214 MW residual is uncontracted merchant exposure — material under low-RRP cannibalisation scenarios.
